SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearBehavioralPatterns

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl.ViewRiksdagenElectionYearBehavioralPatterns
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearBehavioralPatterns extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenElectionYearBehavioralPatterns. Database view for election year behavioral pattern analysis comparing 7 election years (2002-2026) vs midterm years with statistical baselines.
See Also:
